title: SOURCE FATMAN SUBJECT ECONOMICS TOPIC 4 INFLATION AND UNEMPL

questions.question: Which of the following is the most appropriate measure of a country's economic growth? / किसी देश के आर्थिक विकास का सबसे उपयुक्त माप निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा है?
options: Per Capita Real Income / प्रति व्यक्ति वास्तविक आय
questions.explanation: Per Capita Real Income accounts for both inflation and population growth, making it a better indicator of welfare.

questions.question: What is subtracted from Gross Domestic Product (GDP) to get Net Domestic Product (NDP)? / सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (GDP) में से क्या घटाने पर शुद्ध घरेलू उत्पाद (NDP) प्राप्त होता है?
questions.explanation: Net = Gross - Depreciation.

questions.question: National Income in India is estimated by which organization? / भारत में राष्ट्रीय आय का अनुमान किस संगठन द्वारा लगाया जाता है?
options: National Statistical Office (NSO) / राष्ट्रीय सांख्यिकी कार्यालय (NSO)
questions.explanation: The NSO (formerly CSO) is responsible for coordinating statistical activities and estimating National Income.

questions.question: If Net Factor Income from Abroad (NFIA) is positive, then: / यदि विदेशों से शुद्ध कारक आय (NFIA) सकारात्मक है, तो:
questions.explanation: GNP = GDP + NFIA. If NFIA is positive, GNP will be higher than GDP.

questions.question: The value of National Income adjusted for inflation is called: / मुद्रास्फीति के लिए समायोजित राष्ट्रीय आय के मूल्य को क्या कहा जाता है?
options: Per Capita Income / प्रति व्यक्ति आय
Real National Income / वास्तविक राष्ट्रीय आय
Nominal National Income / नाममात्र राष्ट्रीय आय
questions.explanation: Real Income is calculated at constant prices, removing the effect of price changes.

questions.question: Which method of calculating National Income measures the contribution of each producing unit? / राष्ट्रीय आय गणना की कौन सी विधि प्रत्येक उत्पादक इकाई के योगदान को मापती है?
options: Value Added Method / मूल्य वर्धित विधि
questions.explanation: Also known as the Product Method, it calculates the value added at each stage of production.

questions.question: Transfer payments (like old-age pensions) are: / हस्तांतरण भुगतान (जैसे वृद्धावस्था पेंशन) हैं:
options: Included in National Income / राष्ट्रीय आय में शामिल
Part of GDP but not GNP / जीडीपी का हिस्सा लेकिन जीएनपी का नहीं
Part of Indirect Taxes / अप्रत्यक्ष करों का हिस्सा
Excluded from National Income / राष्ट्रीय आय से बाहर
questions.explanation: Transfer payments are excluded because they do not represent any current production of goods or services.

questions.question: Personal Disposable Income is equal to: / व्यक्तिगत प्रयोज्य आय किसके बराबर है?
questions.explanation: It is the amount left with individuals after paying direct taxes (like Income Tax) to spend or save.

questions.question: In the Expenditure Method, GDP is calculated as: / व्यय विधि में, GDP की गणना किस प्रकार की जाती है?
questions.explanation: C=Consumption, I=Investment, G=Govt Spending, (X-M)=Net Exports.

questions.question: The "Base Year" for the current series of National Income accounts in India is: / भारत में राष्ट्रीय आय खातों की वर्तमान श्रृंखला के लिए "आधार वर्ष" क्या है?
questions.explanation: The base year was revised from 2004-05 to 2011-12 to better reflect the economy's structure.

questions.question: What is "Depreciation" also known as? / "मूल्यह्रास" को और किस नाम से जाना जाता है?
options: Consumption of Fixed Capital / स्थिर पूंजी का उपभोग
questions.explanation: It represents the wear and tear of fixed assets during production.

questions.question: "Factor Cost" refers to: / "कारक लागत" (Factor Cost) संदर्भित करता है:
options: Price in the retail market / खुदरा बाजार में कीमत
Market price plus subsidies / बाजार मूल्य प्लस सब्सिडी
Cost of inputs used in production / उत्पादन में प्रयुक्त इनपुट की लागत
questions.explanation: It is the total cost of factors (Land, Labour, Capital, Entrepreneur) used to produce a good.

questions.question: Net Indirect Tax (NIT) is calculated as: / शुद्ध अप्रत्यक्ष कर (NIT) की गणना इस प्रकार की जाती है:
questions.explanation: NIT is the difference between the tax paid to the govt and the subsidy received back.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT included in the Income Method? / निम्नलिखित में से क्या आय विधि में शामिल नहीं है?
options: Wages and Salaries / मजदूरी और वेतन
questions.explanation: Income method focuses on Factor Payments (Wages, Rent, Interest, Profit). Export earnings are part of the Expenditure method.

questions.question: When National Income is calculated at Market Price, it includes: / जब राष्ट्रीय आय की गणना बाजार मूल्य पर की जाती है, तो इसमें शामिल होता है:
options: Net Indirect Taxes / शुद्ध अप्रत्यक्ष कर
questions.explanation: Market Price = Factor Cost + Net Indirect Taxes.

questions.question: "Double Counting" in National Income can be avoided by: / राष्ट्रीय आय में "दोहरी गणना" से किसके द्वारा बचा जा सकता है?
options: Using Value Added Method / मूल्य वर्धित विधि का उपयोग करके
Counting final goods only / केवल अंतिम वस्तुओं की गणना करके
Counting all transactions / सभी लेन-देन की गणना करके
questions.explanation: Including intermediate goods leads to counting the same value multiple times.

questions.question: GDP at Factor Cost (GDPfc) is equal to: / कारक लागत पर जीडीपी (GDPfc) किसके बराबर है?
questions.explanation: To reach Factor Cost from Market Price, we subtract the tax element.

questions.question: NFIA stands for: / NFIA का पूर्ण रूप क्या है?
questions.explanation: It is the difference between income earned by residents abroad and income earned by non-residents in the domestic country.

questions.question: Who wrote the book "Poverty and Un-British Rule in India"? / "पावर्टी एंड अन-ब्रिटिश रूल इन इंडिया" पुस्तक किसने लिखी थी?
questions.explanation: In this book, Naoroji gave the first estimate of India's National Income.

questions.question: Intermediate goods are those which are: / मध्यवर्ती वस्तुएं वे हैं जो:
options: Resold or used for further production in the same year / उसी वर्ष पुनर्विक्रय या आगे के उत्पादन के लिए उपयोग की जाती हैं
Not part of GDP / जीडीपी का हिस्सा नहीं हैं
Bought by households only / केवल परिवारों द्वारा खरीदी जाती हैं
Used for final consumption / अंतिम उपभोग के लिए उपयोग की जाती हैं
questions.explanation: Goods like flour used by a baker are intermediate; flour bought by a home for chapatis is final.

questions.question: National Income is often represented by which aggregate? / राष्ट्रीय आय को अक्सर किस समुच्चय द्वारा दर्शाया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Net National Product at Factor Cost is the standard definition of National Income.

questions.question: If a country is a "Closed Economy," then: / यदि कोई देश "बंद अर्थव्यवस्था" है, तो:
questions.explanation: In a closed economy, NFIA is zero, so Domestic and National aggregates are equal.

questions.question: "Mixed Income of Self-Employed" is a component of which method? / "स्व-नियोजित की मिश्रित आय" किस विधि का एक घटक है?
options: Value Added Method / मूल्य वर्धित विधि
questions.explanation: It refers to the income of individuals who provide their own labor and capital (like shopkeepers).

questions.question: Which of the following is a "Stock" variable? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक "स्टॉक" चर है?
questions.explanation: Wealth is measured at a point in time, while Income is a flow over a period.

questions.question: Per Capita Income is calculated as: / प्रति व्यक्ति आय की गणना इस प्रकार की जाती है:
questions.explanation: It gives the average income per person in the country.

questions.question: Value of Output is calculated as: / आउटपुट के मूल्य की गणना इस प्रकार की जाती है:
questions.explanation: If some goods produced are not sold, they are added to the stock.

questions.question: Change in Stock is: / स्टॉक में परिवर्तन है:
questions.explanation: It represents the inventory accumulated during the year.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a factor of production? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन उत्पादन का कारक नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Land, Labour, Capital, and Entrepreneurship are the four primary factors. Raw materials are intermediate inputs.

questions.question: What is the formula for NNP mp? / NNP mp का सूत्र क्या है?
questions.explanation: NNP can be reached by subtracting depreciation from GNP or adding taxes to NNP fc.

questions.question: Domestic Territory of a country includes: / किसी देश के घरेलू क्षेत्र में शामिल हैं:
options: Fishing vessels operated by residents / निवासियों द्वारा संचालित मछली पकड़ने के जहाज
Embassies located abroad / विदेश में स्थित दूतावास
questions.explanation: Economic territory is wider than just geographical boundaries.

questions.question: Consider the following statements regarding "Real GDP" and "Nominal GDP": / "वास्तविक जीडीपी" और "नाममात्र जीडीपी" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें: Statement 1: Nominal GDP is calculated at current market prices. / कथन 1: नाममात्र जीडीपी की गणना वर्तमान बाजार मूल्यों पर की जाती है। Statement 2: Real GDP is always higher than Nominal GDP. / कथन 2: वास्तविक जीडीपी हमेशा नाममात्र जीडीपी से अधिक होती है। Statement 3: Real GDP provides a better comparison of physical output over years. / कथन 3: वास्तविक जीडीपी वर्षों के भौतिक उत्पादन का बेहतर तुलनात्मक विवरण प्रदान करती है। Q31. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Real GDP is usually lower than Nominal GDP in inflationary periods. It uses base year prices.

questions.question: Assertion (A): National Income (NNP fc) does not include Indirect Taxes. / अभिकथन (A): राष्ट्रीय आय (NNP fc) में अप्रत्यक्ष कर शामिल नहीं होते हैं। Reason (R): Factor Cost represents the actual payments made to the factors of production. / कारण (R): कारक लागत उत्पादन के कारकों को किए गए वास्तविक भुगतान का प्रतिनिधित्व करती है। Q32. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: Taxes go to the government, not the producers/factors, so they are excluded from NNP fc.

questions.question: Match the following conversions: / निम्नलिखित रूपांतरणों को सुमेलित करें: List I (From -> To) | List II (Action) 1. Gross -> Net | A. Add NFIA 2. Domestic -> National | B. Subtract Depreciation 3. Market Price -> Factor Cost | C. Subtract Net Indirect Taxes Q33. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: These are the three golden rules of National Income accounting.

questions.question: Which of the following are included while calculating "National Income"? / "राष्ट्रीय आय" की गणना करते समय निम्नलिखित में से किसे शामिल किया जाता है? 1. Brokerage on the sale of second-hand goods. / पुरानी वस्तुओं की बिक्री पर ब्रोकरेज। 2. Windfall gains like lottery winnings. / लॉटरी जीत जैसे अप्रत्याशित लाभ। 3. Imputed rent of self-occupied houses. / स्व-कब्जे वाले घरों का अनुमानित किराया। Q34. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Second-hand goods are excluded, but the service (brokerage) is current. Lotteries are excluded as no production occurs.

questions.question: Assertion (A): GDP is not a perfect indicator of social welfare. / अभिकथन (A): जीडीपी सामाजिक कल्याण का एक आदर्श संकेतक नहीं है। Reason (R): GDP does not account for the distribution of income or environmental degradation. / कारण (R): जीडीपी आय के वितरण या पर्यावरणीय गिरावट को ध्यान में नहीं रखता है। Q35. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: A rising GDP might hide growing inequality or pollution.

questions.question: Arrange the following components of the Income Method to get NNP fc: / NNP fc प्राप्त करने के लिए आय विधि के निम्नलिखित घटकों को व्यवस्थित करें: 1. Compensation of Employees / कर्मचारियों का मुआवजा 2. Operating Surplus (Rent + Int + Profit) / परिचालन अधिशेष 3. Mixed Income / मिश्रित आय 4. Net Factor Income from Abroad / विदेशों से शुद्ध कारक आय Q36. Choose the correct sequence (addition) / सही क्रम चुनें
options: (1+2+3) = NDP fc; then NDP fc + 4 = NNP fc
questions.explanation: Domestic income is the sum of payments within borders; adding NFIA makes it National.

questions.question: Identify the correct pair of "Aggregates": / "समुच्चय" (Aggregates) की सही जोड़ी पहचानें: 1. NNP mp = GNP mp - Depreciation 2. NDP fc = GDP fc - Depreciation 3. GNP fc = GDP fc + NFIA 4. NNP fc = NNP mp - Net Indirect Tax Q37. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: All formulas are mathematically correct conversions.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Intermediate consumption is not included in National Income. / अभिकथन (A): मध्यवर्ती उपभोग को राष्ट्रीय आय में शामिल नहीं किया जाता है। Reason (R): Including it would lead to the problem of double counting. / कारण (R): इसे शामिल करने से दोहरी गणना की समस्या पैदा होगी। Q38. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: To avoid inflating the GDP, only final value is taken.

questions.question: Regarding the "Value Added Method", consider the following: / "मूल्य वर्धित विधि" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित पर विचार करें: Statement 1: Value Added = Value of Output - Intermediate Consumption. / कथन 1: मूल्य वर्धित = आउटपुट का मूल्य - मध्यवर्ती उपभोग। Statement 2: It is used to avoid double counting. / कथन 2: इसका उपयोग दोहरी गणना से बचने के लिए किया जाता है। Statement 3: It includes the value of illegal activities. / कथन 3: इसमें अवैध गतिविधियों का मूल्य शामिल है। Q39. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Illegal activities are excluded from National Income calculations as data is unavailable and they are not legally recognized.

questions.question: Match the type of "Product" with its inclusion in GDP: / "उत्पाद" के प्रकार को जीडीपी में शामिल करने के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Product) | List II (Inclusion Status) 1. Car produced in India by a Japanese firm | A. Included in India's GNP 2. Car produced in Japan by an Indian firm | B. Included in India's GDP 3. Household chores by a housewife | C. Excluded from GDP Q40. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: GDP is location-based; GNP is resident-based; non-market services are excluded.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Net Factor Income from Abroad (NFIA) can be negative. / अभिकथन (A): विदेशों से शुद्ध कारक आय (NFIA) नकारात्मक हो सकती है। Reason (R): Income paid to foreigners can be more than income received from residents abroad. / कारण (R): विदेशियों को किया गया भुगतान विदेशों में रहने वाले निवासियों से प्राप्त आय से अधिक हो सकता है। Q41. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: This is true for many developing countries where foreign investment and labor outflows differ.

questions.question: Which of the following are components of "Operating Surplus"? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन "परिचालन अधिशेष" के घटक हैं? 1. Rent / किराया 2. Royalty / रॉयल्टी 3. Interest / ब्याज 4. Profit / लाभ Q42. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Operating surplus is the income from property and entrepreneurship.

questions.question: Match the Method with its alternative name: / विधि को उसके वैकल्पिक नाम के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Method) | List II (Other Name) 1. Value Added Method | A. Consumption-Investment Method 2. Income Method | B. Factor Payment Method 3. Expenditure Method | C. Industrial Origin Method Q43. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: These names reflect how the data is gathered in each approach.

questions.question: Assertion (A): The purchase of a second-hand car is not included in GDP. / अभिकथन (A): पुरानी कार की खरीद जीडीपी में शामिल नहीं है। Reason (R): Its value was already included in the year it was originally produced. / कारण (R): इसका मूल्य उस वर्ष में पहले ही शामिल किया जा चुका था जब इसे मूल रूप से उत्पादित किया गया था। Q44. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: GDP measures production of current goods and services.

questions.question: Regarding "GNP at Market Price", consider the following: / "बाजार मूल्य पर जीएनपी" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित पर विचार करें: Statement 1: GNP mp = GDP mp + NFIA. / कथन 1: GNP mp = GDP mp + NFIA. Statement 2: It includes the value of all final goods produced by residents. / कथन 2: इसमें निवासियों द्वारा उत्पादित सभी अंतिम वस्तुओं का मूल्य शामिल है। Statement 3: It excludes depreciation. / कथन 3: इसमें मूल्यह्रास शामिल नहीं है। Q45. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Statement 3 is false because "Gross" aggregates always include depreciation.

questions.question: Identify the correct sequence to calculate NNP fc starting from GDP mp: / GDP mp से शुरू करके NNP fc की गणना करने के लिए सही क्रम की पहचान करें: 1. Subtract Depreciation. / मूल्यह्रास घटाएं। 2. Add NFIA. / NFIA जोड़ें। 3. Subtract Net Indirect Taxes. / शुद्ध अप्रत्यक्ष कर घटाएं। Q46. Choose the correct sequence / सही क्रम चुनें
questions.explanation: Since addition and subtraction are commutative in this context, the order doesn't change the final NNP fc.

questions.question: Match the type of "Tax" with its category: / "कर" के प्रकार को उसकी श्रेणी के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Tax) | List II (Category) 1. Income Tax | A. Net Indirect Tax (when subsidies are subtracted) 2. GST | B. Direct Tax 3. Subsidy | C. Financial assistance (negative tax) Q47. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: Direct taxes are paid by individuals; indirect taxes are on goods (GST).

questions.question: Assertion (A): High GDP growth always leads to high Per Capita Income growth. / अभिकथन (A): उच्च जीडीपी विकास दर हमेशा उच्च प्रति व्यक्ति आय विकास की ओर ले जाती है। Reason (R): If population growth rate is higher than GDP growth rate, Per Capita Income will fall. / कारण (R): यदि जनसंख्या वृद्धि दर जीडीपी विकास दर से अधिक है, तो प्रति व्यक्ति आय गिर जाएगी। Q48. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true
A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Per Capita Income depends on both the numerator (GDP) and denominator (Population).

questions.question: Which of the following items are treated as "Intermediate Goods"? / निम्नलिखित में से किन वस्तुओं को "मध्यवर्ती वस्तुओं" के रूप में माना जाता है? 1. Coal used by a factory. / कारखाने द्वारा उपयोग किया जाने वाला कोयला। 2. Paper used by a publisher. / प्रकाशक द्वारा उपयोग किया जाने वाला कागज। 3. Mobile phone bought by a student. / एक छात्र द्वारा खरीदा गया मोबाइल फोन। Q49. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: 1 and 2 are used for further production; 3 is for final consumption.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Real GDP is a better measure of growth than Nominal GDP. / अभिकथन (A): वास्तविक जीडीपी नाममात्र जीडीपी की तुलना में विकास का बेहतर पैमाना है। Reason (R): Real GDP increases only when there is an increase in the physical flow of goods and services. / कारण (R): वास्तविक जीडीपी तभी बढ़ती है जब वस्तुओं और सेवाओं के भौतिक प्रवाह में वृद्धि होती है। Q50. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: Real GDP keeps prices constant, so any change reflects a change in quantity produced.
